generate-components.description: Generate framework components from DevExtreme metadata

clean.description: Clean directories with support for simple or recursive mode

add-license-headers.description: Add license headers to compiled files

prepare-submodules.description: Prepare submodule entry points with package.json files

build-typescript.description: Build TypeScript modules (CJS or ESM) with configurable output format

pack-npm.description: Run pnpm pack for npm distribution

karma-multi-env.description: Run Karma tests sequentially across multiple Angular environments (client, server, hydration)

localization.description: Generate localization message files and TypeScript CLDR data modules

concatenate-files.description: Concatenate files with optional content extraction and transforms

babel-transform.description: Transform JavaScript/TypeScript files using Babel with configurable presets

create-dual-mode-manifest.description: Generate package.json files for dual-mode (ESM + CJS) package support

bundle.description: Bundle JavaScript files using webpack with debug or production mode

vectormap.description: Build vectormap utility bundles and geographic region data modules

dts-modules.description: Assemble TypeScript declaration modules: copy, stamp with license, and strip debug blocks

dts-bundle.description: Assemble TypeScript declaration bundle files from source

npm-assemble.description: Assemble npm package from transpiled sources, bin, license, dist files and meta

scss-assemble.description: Assemble SCSS package: copy files with data-uri inlining, fonts, and icons

license-check.description: Verify embedded license notices in built artifacts

state-manager-optimize.description: Optimize state_manager modules for production builds
